tape: Risk-off premium easing: Trump SCRAPPED the surprise 20% Strait of Hormuz cargo toll (replacing it with Gulf-state trade/investment deals), removing the key escalation catalyst though the Iran naval blockade still begins 20:00 GMT (~4pm ET) today; WTI backed off Monday's +9.4% spike to ~$79, VIX down to ~16.4, and June CPI ran cool at 3.5% (vs 3.8% est) -- S&P +0.28% / Nasdaq +0.55% while the Dow lags ~-0.9% on IBM -25% and soft Citi/Wells prints. quant_regime reads calm_drift; research.json's risk_off framing now leans stale on the oil leg and the next research run should reconsider.

alerts.headline: De-escalation vs research.json: Trump dropped the 20% Hormuz toll (Gulf trade deals instead), so the oil-shock premium behind today's risk_off is fading -- oil off highs (~$79), VIX 16.4, CPI cool. Iran blockade enforcement still starts 20:00 GMT today = one live energy event into the close.

Held, no fresh news: with the Hormuz toll scrapped the energy tailwind eases; bounced to ~$13.30 off yesterday's -3.9% ($13.05). Overhang intact -- active $300M ATM + Form 144 insider SALE (Chalmers 7/9) make the insider picture mixed, Lorentzian k-NN -0.75 bearish. Risk-flagged -> no boost.

Held/book's best gainer +7.2% (~$14.19) on carried Buy coverage -- move already in the tape, not a fresh un-priced catalyst; post-lockup distribution (7/8 Form 144 for 1.75M sh + 7/9 Lightspeed sale) remains the overhang. Carried, no boost.

Watchlist: no fresh item -- concur with risk.json, the ~$5.8B all-stock Valaris deal (holders to ~53% pro forma) carries a DOJ second request pushing earliest close to ~9/29; dilution + binary-vote risk the 'clean backlog' framing understates. Do-not-chase.

AVOID (carried): 12-for-1 reverse split effective TODAY (new CUSIP G8071C137) for Nasdaq $1 compliance on an AI/crypto-pivot pump; radar already penalizes it to 5.2 (below the 6.25 line). FinBERT +0.919 is a misattributed generic-market headline -- disregard.

AVOID (carried): ~30% dilution via $50M registered direct (27.6M sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26; stock $1.72 sits below the offer, CEO's 7/7 buy came after the raise. Radar 5.17, below line.
AVOID (carried): textbook pump-and-dump -- HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.53. No fundamental catalyst; radar 5.1, below line. Reject on pump veto.

Held/HELD-radar 10.73 but risk.json says DO-NOT-ADD: $200M standing S-3 baby-shelf on a sub-$100M post-+48%-pump name. Only fresh item is a ~$1.2M international-orders/WrapShield update (positive but immaterial). Keep flag, do not increase.

movers.note: +7.2% (~$14.19) on carried Buy coverage; already priced, not fresh.
Bouncing ~$13.30 off yesterday's -3.9% close; energy tailwind fading as Hormuz toll dropped.
~-25% on an earnings warning (enterprise spend shifting to AI infra) -- broad tech-tape drag, not held.
